chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.47 of 2023 Sajid Nawaz Khan Versus Muzammil Rao & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 24.10.2023 None present. -.-.- This appeal is pending for quite some time and the office objections have not been complied with. On 02.06.2023 one week time was granted to make compliance but in vain as today yet again the matter is fixed for non-prosecution as office objections have not been complied with. Even the appellant and his counsel are called absent and there is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
